name: What evidence do I need to prove my law firm deserves AI search rankings?
description: Schema to bar profiles + E-E-A-T content.[1]

mainEntity.name: What evidence do I need to prove my law firm deserves AI search rankings?

acceptedAnswer.text: Schema to bar profiles + E-E-A-T content.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Deploy verifiable schema linking to bar profiles and case results.** Use Attorney/Person schema with sameAs to Avvo/State Bar, plus AggregateRating for reviews.[1][2]

AI scans for E-E-A-T: bios, statutes, P-A-R wins make you authoritative.[1]

**Key Factors:**
- sameAs links to verified profiles.[1]
- Gov/statute citations only.[1]
- Structured case outcomes.
- Keyword-rich reviews.

**Practical Guidance:** Audit bios for schema, add 10+ FAQ pages with sources, encourage specific testimonials. Validate all markup.

These signals directly feed AI trust.
